turns.content: What brings you in today?
My knees hurt. Morning is worst. Hard to get out of bed.
When did this start?
Maybe 6 months? Not sure. Just... one day it started.
Can you describe the pain or discomfort? Where exactly do you feel it?
Both knees. Both sides. And sometimes my back hurts too.
Have you had any fever or chills?
No. No fever. Just ache.
What medications are you currently taking?
I take the white pills. Ibuprofen. And the other pills too. For pain. I forget the name.
Do you have any chronic medical conditions?
Yes. The doctor said arthritis. And I am very heavy.
Are you allergic to any medications?
No. I think no. Never had a problem.
Have you tried anything to relieve the symptoms?
I use a heating pad. It helps a little. I rest my legs.
Does anything make it better or worse?
Standing long is bad. Morning is worst. Rest helps a little.
How has this been affecting your daily life?
I walk slower now. Can't carry bags. But I manage. It's okay.
Do you smoke or drink alcohol?
No smoke. No drink. Just sometimes a little wine on holiday.
Has anyone in your family had similar problems?
I don't remember. My mother was old. Maybe she had it too.
Have you experienced anything like this before?
No. Not like this. Pain before was less. But now it stays.
I've explained quite a bit — does that make sense so far?
No. I don't understand. Can you say again? Simple words, please.
On a scale of 1 to 10, how would you rate what you're going through right now — physically, and also emotionally?
Pain... maybe 4. Not so bad. Emotion? I don't worry much. Maybe 2. I'm okay.
Do you have any questions for me?
No questions. Maybe... is there stronger medicine? For my knees?
What do you think might be going on?
I don't know. Maybe old age? My mother said I'd get it too.
Is there anything else you think I should know?
No. That's all. You help me. Thank you.
